message:
feat: add daemon scheduled maintenance window (gt config set maintenance.window)

User opts in via `gt config set maintenance.window 03:00` and
`gt config set maintenance.interval daily`. The daemon checks commit
counts per DB during the maintenance window (1 hour starting at
configured time). When any DB exceeds the threshold (default 1000),
runs `gt maintain --force`.

Config stored in daemon.json alongside existing patrol configs.
Supports daily/weekly/monthly/custom duration intervals.

(gt-ghl6)
